markdown:
Preview

# Explore everything in shadcncraft

shadcncraft is a production-ready design system built on shadcn/ui. Explore the official [Figma UI kit](https://shadcncraft.com/figma), Pro Blocks, and matching React components for product, marketing, and ecommerce teams.

## Figma

Base

[Base shadcn/ui Figma UI Kit](https://shadcncraft.com/figma)

All official shadcn/ui Components recreated in Figma with variables and theming support. Start designing with a solid, production-aligned foundation.

[View in Figma](https://www.figma.com/design/J2TEyxBl5KhsemzOObfuW7/shadcncraft-Base-%E2%80%A2-v3.0?node-id=7053-59081&t=HK1KQKlai4CbILOh-11)

Pro

[Pro Figma UI Kit](https://shadcncraft.com/figma)

Pro: Hundreds of premium blocks, components, and page layouts for apps, marketing, and ecommerce. Powered by shadcn styles with native Figma variables and instant switching.

[View in Figma](https://www.figma.com/design/AowV2WsmEZ4NXBlHlrsBg8/shadcncraft-Pro-%E2%80%A2-v3.1-%E2%80%A2-Preview?node-id=7053-59081)

Free

[Figma plugin](https://shadcncraft.com/figma/plugin)

Import shadcn Create projects, apply and export themes, and export React code from selected frames. Keep your shadcn/ui Figma files aligned with production.

[Learn More](https://shadcncraft.com/figma/plugin)

## React

Pro

Pro Figma + React Blocks

Production-ready React versions of the Pro Blocks library. Clean, structured layouts built with shadcn/ui and ready to ship.

[Browse Blocks](https://shadcncraft.com/blocks)

Pro

Pro Figma + React Components

Matching React components aligned 1:1 with the [Figma UI kit](https://shadcncraft.com/figma). Built with Tailwind and shadcn/ui for consistent design and code.

[Browse Components](https://shadcncraft.com/components)

Pro

Pro Sites

Production-ready React and Next.js Sites built with shadcn/ui. Complete, structured projects you can customize, and deploy.

[Browse Sites](https://shadcncraft.com/sites/clearflow)

Not sure which license you need? [Compare plans](https://shadcncraft.com/pricing)

![@shadcn](https://shadcncraft.com/site/avatars/shadcn.webp)![@brycepatrick](https://shadcncraft.com/site/avatars/brycepatrick.webp)![@iamsahaj_xyz](https://shadcncraft.com/site/avatars/iamsahaj_xyz.webp)![@osazi_](https://shadcncraft.com/site/avatars/osazi_.webp)![@TosoAlberto](https://shadcncraft.com/site/avatars/tosoalberto.webp)![@jason_kitio](https://shadcncraft.com/site/avatars/jason_kitio.webp)

## Join 9,000+ builders shipping with shadcncraft

Design and assemble full pages faster with production-ready blocks built for real products.

- Production-ready blocks and components
- Clean React and Tailwind parity
- Built for SaaS, marketing, and ecommerce teams

[Get the design system](https://shadcncraft.com/pricing)

![Join Now CTA](https://shadcncraft.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.shadcncraft.com%2Fimages%2Fsite%2Fjoin-cta.webp&w=3840&q=75)

## Real support from the team behind shadcncraft

Get help within 24 hours from the people who build and maintain the system.

shadcncraft10:30 AM

Hey! How can we help? 👋

You10:31 AM

I need help theming my components

Email

Prefer a direct line? Send us a message and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

[Contact](https://shadcncraft.com/contact)

Discord

Get quick support, share feedback, or connect with other builders.

[Join](https://discord.com/invite/tzgMKeqG3s)

Feedback

Got something to say about anything shadcncraft? We'd love to hear it.

Send feedback

__llm_logo_reasoning.reasoning: Selected #0 because it is located in the header, is visible, and links to the homepage, which are strong indicators of a primary brand logo.

primary.reasoning: Button #0 ('Get the design system') is the primary CTA due to its distinct dark background color (#171717), which stands out against the light theme of the page, making it more prominent and action-oriented.

secondary.reasoning: Button #5 ('View in Figma') is chosen as the secondary CTA because it has a different background color (#FFFFFF) from the primary button and is relevant to the site's focus on design systems.

rawLogoSelection.selectedLogoReasoning: Selected #0 because it is located in the header, is visible, and links to the homepage, which are strong indicators of a primary brand logo.

summary: shadcncraft is a comprehensive design system based on shadcn/ui, providing resources for product, marketing, and ecommerce teams. Key offerings include a Figma UI kit with base and pro components, a Figma plugin for project management, and production-ready React and Next.js components and sites. Users can explore hundreds of blocks and components, ensuring a consistent design experience. The platform promises fast support from the development team and encourages community interaction through Discord, while also offering options to compare licensing plans.
